MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patricia Leong for Christine Bennett.

Off Calendar Sep-21-2011 Continued To Oct-05-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patricia Leong for Christine Bennett.

The Petition for Probate of Will was continued to October 5, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of Attorney Richard Wise' declaration regarding execution of the will and the Court's review of said declaration.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Anasse.
